# stringRepresentation

**Instance Property**

The MAC Address as an uppercase string, in the format `"XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX"`.

## Declaration

```swift
var stringRepresentation: String { get }
```

## Working with MAC Addresses as strings

- **init(_:)**: Creates a MAC Address from the provided case-insensitive string, of the format `"XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX"`.
